'''Nod Kartha''' was a desolate, rocky [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Karthakk system]].

==History==
It was the site of a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] laboratory producing the illegal chemical weapon [[trihexalon]], prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was heavily defended by [[Orbital Defense Cannon|orbital defense cannons]] and powerful [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] systems.

The defense system was compromised by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces of [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], following the Hex attack on [[Maramere]]. Aided by [[Mere cruiser]]s, Nym punched a hole through the [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] defenses, and staged an assault on the Hex factory planetside. The facility was destroyed by Nym and the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]], halting production of Hex weapons for [[Cavik Toth]]'s mercenaries. Fleeing Nod Kartha, Nym's forces were engaged by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Bella (Twi'lek)|Bella]] and her task force, though were able to recover a damaged orbital defense cannon and escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], decimating the [[Reaver (Sabaoth destroyer)|''Reaver'']] in the process.

{{Planet-stub}}
